_README: Depth corrections for the FFIEC 031 Call hierarchy. Root cause: CDR column order != PDF item order; items from one section appear adjacent to items from another, and if the displaced item has PDF depth=2 the audit/visual tree shows it as a false child of the preceding depth=1 item. Fix pattern: drop_codes uses key-scoped {key,mdrm} objects (NOT Y-9C flat strings) because Call codes repeat across 45 schedules — RCFD1773 appears in 5 schedules, RCFD3632 in 3. A flat-string global drop would silently remove correct entries from sibling schedules. drop_code removes the wrong-depth item; force_row re-adds it with corrected depth at the same CDR order position. Consumed by build_hierarchy.py apply_overrides(). Rebuild: python build_hierarchy.py --pdf Call_Cert18409_12312025.PDF

drop_codes._note: RC: RCFD1773 (AFS, item=2.b, depth=2) after RCFD1754 (HtM, item=8, depth=1). No parent item '2' in RC. Corrected to depth=1.
RC: RCFD3632 (Undivided Profits, item=26.a, depth=2) after RCFD3548 (Trading Liab, item=15, depth=1). No parent item '26' in RC. Corrected to depth=1.
RCL: RCFD3826 (FX Swaps $5.9T, item=12.e, depth=2) after RCFD3821 (Perf Standby, item=3, depth=1). No parent item '12' in RCL. Corrected to depth=1.
RC: RCFD5369 (Loans & Leases HFS, item=4.a, depth=2) after RCFD3839 (Other Equity, item=25, depth=1). No parent item '4' in RC before it. Corrected to depth=1.
RC: RCONB993 (Fed Funds Purchased Domestic, item=14.a, depth=2) after RCONB989 (item=3, depth=1). No parent item '14' in RC before it. Corrected to depth=1.
RCR: RCFD1773 (AFS, item=2.b, depth=2) after RCFD1754 (HtM, item=8, depth=1). Same CDR-order artifact as RC/8. No parent item '2' in RCR.
RCR: RCFD3210 (Total Equity Capital, item=27.a, depth=2) after RCFD3128 (Allocated Transfer Risk, item=30, depth=1). No parent item '27' in RCR. Item 27 cannot be child of item 30.
RCB: RCFD1773 (AFS, item=2.b, depth=2) after RCFD1772 (HtM Total, item=8, depth=1). Same CDR-order artifact. No parent item '2' in RCB before it.
RCRII: RCFD1773 (AFS, item=2.b, depth=2) after RCFD1754 (HtM, item=8, depth=1). Same CDR-order artifact. No parent item '2' in RCRII before it.
RCRI: RCFAA223 (Risk-Weighted Assets, item=48.a, depth=2) after RCFA8274 (item=26, depth=1). No parent item '48' in RCRI. Item 48 cannot be child of item 26.
RCRIB: RCFAA223 (Risk-Weighted Assets, item=48.a, depth=2) after RCFA8274 (item=26, depth=1). No parent item '48' in RCRIB. Item 48 cannot be child of item 26.

RCRIB: RCFAP850 (Less: All Other Deductions, item=10.b, depth=2) after RCFAP849 (item=9.f, depth=2) which is after RCFAP843 (item=8, depth=1). No parent item '10' anywhere in RCRIB. Corrected to depth=1.

RCT: RCFDB872-RCFDB875 (Employee Benefit Defined Contribution, items=5.a, depth=2) appear right after RCFDB871 (item=4, depth=1). Section 5 and section 4 are different parts of RCT. No parent item '5' in RCT.

RCT: RCFDB876-RCFDB879 (Employee Benefit Defined Benefit, items=5.b, depth=2). Same CDR-order batch, no parent item '5'.

RCT: RIADB905-907 (Employee Benefit income, items=15.a/b/c, depth=2) appear right after RIADB904 (Personal Trust, item=14, depth=1). No parent item '15' in RCT. Income section 15 is separate from asset section 14.

RCT: same batch — item 15.c
